title: Speaking - Part 3
description: Look at the question and the ideas around it. Discuss each idea with your partner for about two minutes, then decide together which two are the most important.

content.centralQuestion: How can the urban housing crisis be solved?
suggestions: Encouraging people to move to rural areas
content.decisionTask: Now decide which two solutions are the most realistic and effective.

script.text: I'd like you to look at this question and these ideas, and talk together about possible solutions to the urban housing crisis.
Now you have about a minute to decide which two solutions are the most realistic.
